identity.name: LaunchCode
identity.target_audience: AI founders, researchers, engineers, and investors at the frontier of AI — especially video AI and generative AI startups

design_principles: Dark-first: always dark — like Replicate, Linear, Vercel
Technical aesthetic: monospace accents, precise spacing, subtle borders
Violet/purple as the single brand accent
Cards elevate on hover with brand-colored glow border
Inter for UI, JetBrains Mono for labels and brand mark
